title: Didi To CEC: Reject BJP-Bid To Add 30k Voters To WB List From Other States
description: The TMC chief further argued, “The issuance of the Memo No. 3420-Home(Elec) dated 27th March 2026 allowing addition through Form 6 and addition by shifting through Form 8 considered till the last day of nomination is absolutely illegal and unfair by reasons of the Orders of the Hon'ble Supreme Court and beyond the statutory scheme of the Registration of the Electors Rules 1960.
